ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the size category (e.g., Men's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard (e.g., US) */,
  "unit_system" TEXT /* Unit system used (e.g., Imperial, Metric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "numerical_size" TEXT /* Numerical size range (e.g., 44, 46 - 48) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist size range (e.g., 30, 31 - 33) */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam length range (e.g., 31, 31 - 32) */,
  "height_cm" TEXT /* Height range in centimeters (e.g., 173 - 175) */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest size range in centimeters (e.g., 89 - 93) */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder width range in centimeters (e.g., 45 - 47) */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip size range in centimeters (e.g., 95 - 100) */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length range in centimeters (e.g., 60 - 62) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "numerical_size" TEXT /* Numerical size range (e.g., 44, 46 - 48) */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist size range (e.g., 30, 31 - 33) */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam length range (e.g., 31, 31 - 32) */,
  "height_cm" TEXT /* Height range in centimeters (e.g., 173 - 175) */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest size range in centimeters (e.g., 89 - 93) */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder width range in centimeters (e.g., 45 - 47) */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip size range in centimeters (e.g., 95 - 100) */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length range in centimeters (e.g., 60 - 62) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "numerical_size" INTEGER /* Numerical size (e.g., 44, 46) */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist size (e.g., 30, 31) */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam length (e.g., 31, 32) */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height in centimeters (e.g., 175, 180) */,
  "chest_cm" INTEGER /* Chest size in centimeters (e.g., 93, 100) */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" INTEGER /* Shoulder width in centimeters (e.g., 45, 47) */,
  "hip_cm" INTEGER /* Hip size in centimeters (e.g., 95, 100) */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" INTEGER /* Sleeve length in centimeters (e.g., 60, 62) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Customer Support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
